_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: MariaDB (Optimized)
author: danielb@purpleflaghosting.com
description: An optimized MariaDB egg featuring automated configuration, custom environment variables, and support for LTS versions.
startup: /bin/bash -c 'SOCK=/home/container/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock; while ! mariadb -u container -S $SOCK -e "SELECT 1" > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; EXT_HOST=$([ "${ALLOW_EXTERNAL}" = "true" ] && echo "%" || echo "localhost"); SQL_CMD="ALTER USER \"root\"@\"localhost\" IDENTIFIED BY \"${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD}\"; DROP USER IF EXISTS \"root\"@\"%\";"; if [ "${ALLOW_ROOT_REMOTE}" = "true" ]; then SQL_CMD+=" CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS \"root\"@\"%\" IDENTIFIED BY \"${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD}\"; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO \"root\"@\"%\" WITH GRANT OPTION;"; fi; if [ -n "${MYSQL_DATABASE}" ]; then SQL_CMD+=" CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS ${MYSQL_DATABASE};"; fi; if [ -n "${MYSQL_USER}" ]; then SQL_CMD+=" CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS \"${MYSQL_USER}\"@\"${EXT_HOST}\" IDENTIFIED BY \"${MYSQL_PASSWORD}\"; GRANT ${USER_PRIVILEGES} ON ${MYSQL_DATABASE}.* TO \"${MYSQL_USER}\"@\"${EXT_HOST}\";"; fi; SQL_CMD+=" FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"; mariadb -u container -S $SOCK -e "$SQL_CMD"; tail -f /dev/null'

variables.name: Root Password
variables.description: The password for the root user. DO NOT LEAVE BLANK.

variables.name: Allow Root Remote Access
variables.description: Allow the root user to connect from external hosts. Set to 'true' to enable. WARNING: use a strong password.

variables.name: Database Name
variables.description: The name of the default database to create on startup. Leave blank to skip.

variables.name: Additional User
variables.description: A non-root user to be created. Leave blank to skip.

variables.name: Allow External Connections for Additional User
variables.description: Allow the additional user to connect from external hosts. Set to 'true' to allow from anywhere, 'false' for localhost only.

variables.name: Additional User Privileges
variables.description: Privileges to grant the additional user on their database. Examples: ALL PRIVILEGES, SELECT, SELECT,INSERT,UPDATE,DELETE

variables.name: Max Connections
variables.description: Maximum number of simultaneous client connections.

variables.name: InnoDB Buffer Pool Size (MB)
variables.description: Size of the InnoDB buffer pool in MB. Recommended: 50-70% of available RAM.

variables.name: Enable General Query Log
variables.description: Log all queries to a file. Useful for debugging but impacts performance. Set to 'true' or 'false'.

variables.name: Enable Slow Query Log
variables.description: Log queries that take longer than the threshold. Set to 'true' or 'false'.

variables.name: Slow Query Time Threshold (seconds)
variables.description: Queries taking longer than this many seconds will be logged (if slow query log is enabled).

variables.name: Character Set
variables.description: Default character set for the server.

variables.name: Time Zone
variables.description: Server time zone. Examples: UTC, Europe/Paris, America/New_York
